message:
perf(freeze): add nativeGetLength for O(1) array/string length

Replace slow getPropertyStr("length") with JS_GetLength which is O(1)
for arrays and strings. This optimizes the get_length opcode used by
QuickJS for .length property access.

Results on TypeScript transpileModule benchmark:
- Before: 16.37ms per transpile
- After:  12.33ms per transpile
- Improvement: ~25% faster

Also added length to get_field handlers as fallback for edge cases.
